name: hotwire-rails-toolkit
description: Skills and runnable checkers for Rails + Hotwire apps that ship to web/PWA, iOS, and Android. Unique vs other Rails plugins (which are LLM coders/reviewers): every skill ships a deterministic, CI-runnable linter that flags the failures that produce no error. Covers Hotwire Native bridge components and path config (cross-platform web+iOS+Android), Rails 7→8 upgrade with the LazyRouteSet route-test flake detector, Turbo 8 morphing, Turbo Frames with a dangling-target / duplicate-id linter, targeted Turbo Streams with a broadcast-eavesdropping linter, DB-backed token session auth with a security audit, and Turbo-safe Stimulus patterns.
